subtitle: Senior Product & Platform Leader -- Data Function Ownership | Production ML | Fintech Regulatory Depth
summary_text: Senior technology and platform leader with 14 years owning the data function end-to-end at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating in the consumer credit space. DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions under continuous regulatory governance (PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, all 50 states plus the CFPB). Eight years of multi-year platform roadmap ownership for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM, directing a 45-50 person delivery organization across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation. The data leadership track is the primary credential here; the PM-track work was real and exec-scope but ran without a PM title.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms against governance, compliance, and capability-fit dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and practitioner workflow on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit in the consumer credit space -- financial counseling, debt management, and consumer financial education -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned the data function end-to-end for 14 years -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data-warehouse maturation (reactive reporting -> proper DW -> self-service trajectory), and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing use cases at scale.

Led cross-functional data-definitions discipline across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders -- agreement on metric calculations, definitions, and the cross-team incentive conflicts that surface around them.

Owned multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years, directing a 45-50 person delivery organization (BA, QA, software development) across 12+ stakeholders; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governed sprint-over-sprint decisions; platform extensibility architected from single-product origin to variable multi-product platform.
Owned data governance and quality frameworks under continuous regulatory scrutiny; sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance.
Modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% YoY.
Spearheaded multi-year transition to a digital-first, cloud-first model; migrated all enterprise workloads to Azure across the data and platform stack.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history; built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

projects.title: github.com/mknnmknn/about-mknn
projects.desc: Overview of public projects, with access to private repositories on request. Featured project: career-ops-dml -- a private fork of santifer/career-ops, customized into the LLM-assisted pipeline used daily in my job search. Working code extended alongside Claude Code (Node.js, Claude API, Playwright, Go).
